_comment: Rules for skill-router-userpromptsubmit.sh. patterns/skip are case-insensitive regexes tested against the raw user prompt. type=guardrail injects a MUST reminder; type=skill points the session at a CCC skill. Keep messages to one or two lines — they land in context on every match.

rules.name: action-gate
rules.message: Action gate: numbered plan first, stop, wait for explicit "go" before any edit, commit, or push (standing rules § Prime Directive).

rules.name: py-not-python
rules.message: Windows Python: `py` not `python`, `py -m pip` not `pip` (standing rules § Python Stack; py-pip-guard enforces on Bash).

rules.name: visual-claims-need-pixels
rules.message: R1/R2: visual or pricing claims require a Playwright render + screenshot read back into context; WebFetch text is never the primary source (standing rules § Research Methodology).

rules.name: scraper-skill
rules.message: Load skills/scraper/SKILL.md — fingerprint the agenda platform before building (§ Municipal agenda platforms), walk ALL pages, and remember the networkidle exception for ASP.NET portals.

rules.name: outbound-comms
rules.message: Outbound writing rules: no em/en dashes, double space after periods, deliver in a fenced code block (standing rules § Communication Style → Outbound writing).

rules.name: civil-doc-review
rules.message: Load skills/civil-doc-review/SKILL.md — sheet index diff first, conflict matrix for multi-consultant corridors, spec+data-sheet citations for product findings.
